text:
Services 

As discussed in detail under §10.11, below, the law governing the 
Medicare HH PPS requires the HHA to provide all bundled home health 
services (except DME) either directly or under arrangement while a 
patient is under an open home health plan of care during an open episode. 
Once the patient is discharged, the HHA is no longer responsible for 
providing home health services including the bundled Part B medical 
supplies and therapy services.
